summary: More than 300 humanoid robots participating in China's second robot half-marathon on Sunday will be facing tougher terrain designed to test their technical advancements, as Beijing ​seeks to develop the industry into a major pillar of its ​economy.

title: Kiwi cofounder Mohit Bedi steps down from executive role after four years
summary: In a LinkedIn post on Saturday, Kiwi cofounder Mohit Bedi said he would shift focus to "personal and family” commitments while remaining closely associated with the company as an advisor and long-term shareholder.

title: The lobster is loose, and it’s not going back: Peter Steinberger on building OpenClaw at TED 2026
summary: Steinberger said OpenClaw is being adopted not just by engineers but also by entrepreneurs and individuals with no formal programming background. He added that the release of OpenClaw followed a prolonged period of uncertainty marked by travel and even relocation to two countries.

title: OpenAI B2B applications CTO Srinivas Narayanan announces exit after three years
summary: Srinivas Narayanan, chief technology officer of business-to-business (B2B) applications at American AI company OpenAI, announced on Saturday that he will be leaving the company at the end of next week, marking the close of a three-year stint during a period of high-profile product launches.

title: OpenAI’s Kevin Weil and Sora head Bill Peebles leave company
summary: Kevin Weil, the former chief product officer who later took charge of the OpenAI for Science project, announced Friday that he’s stepping down. Weil joined OpenAI nearly two years ago and previously steered product development at Instagram and Twitter as an executive at those companies.

title: No formal complaints found in Nashik preliminary review, says TCS
summary: Tata Consultancy Service said on Friday that it has not received through its official reporting systems any formal complaints of the nature that are being alleged. title: Cognizant CEO’s 2025 realised pay increases 30% to $10.7 million
summary: Cognizant Technology Solutions chief executive Ravi Kumar S took home $10.7 million in realised compensation in 2025, a more than 30% increase compared with $8.2 million in 2024, according to the company’s filings with the US Securities and Exchange Commission.

title: Mythos a serious threat but more will follow, Barclays CEO says
summary: Anthropic's frontier AI model Mythos is ​a serious threat ​to the global banking system, and ​it is likely to be followed by similar, even more powerful cyberthreats, Barclays chief executive C S Venkatakrishnan said on ‌Friday.
